customer_accounts.description: Stores information about customers, including their personal details, account type, and timestamps.

fields.customer_account_id: Unique identifier for each customer account.
fields.comm_id_fk: Foreign key linking the customer to a communication record.
fields.customer_created_in: Timestamp indicating when the customer record was created.
fields.customer_updated_in: Timestamp indicating the last update made to the customer record.
fields.customer_type: Specifies whether it is a lead or customer.
fields.customer_snooze: Indicates if the customer account is snoozed or inactive temporarily.

users_account.description: Stores user account details including profile information, roles, permissions, and login activity.

fields.users_account_id: Unique identifier for each user account.
fields.deployment_id_fk: Foreign key linking the user account to a deployments table.
fields.user_account_email: Email address associated with the user account.
fields.user_account_location: Geographical or operational location of the user.
fields.user_account_created_in: Timestamp indicating when the user account was created.
fields.user_account_updated_in: Timestamp indicating the most recent update to the user record.
fields.user_account_logged_in_at: Timestamp when the user last logged in.
fields.user_account_logged_out_at: Timestamp when the user last logged out.
fields.user_account_membership_id: Membership id associated with the user account. Used to link with the memberships table
fields.user_account_roles_created: Defines the roles or permissions created for the user.
fields.user_account_permission: Access control or permission level for the user account.
fields.user_account_umail_json: Stores unified mail or communication configuration in JSON format.
fields.user_account_autopilot_mode: Indicates if the user operates in autopilot or automated mode.
fields.special_access: Boolean value indicatingf the user has special access privileges to view other user's accounts.

fields.service_request_id: Unique identifier for each service request.
fields.conversation_thread_id_fk: Foreign key linking the service request to a conversation thread.
fields.service_requests_created_in: Timestamp when the service request was created.
fields.service_requests_updated_in: Timestamp when the service request was last updated.
fields.comm_id_fk: Foreign key linking the service_requests to the comm table.
fields.service_request_name: Title or short name of the ticket
fields.service_requests_SLA: Service Level Agreement details associated with the ticket.
fields.service_requests_assignee_id: The user assigned to handle this ticket. (Dont use this to filter by user)

msgs.description: Stores individual message / mail records exchanged within conversation threads.

fields.conversation_thread_id_fk: Foreign key linking the message to a conversation_thread table.
fields.channel: Channel through which the message was sent, enum value : ('gmail','website','zoho','outlook','whatsapp','sms','phone','instagram_dm','facebook_messenger').
fields.customer_id_fk: Foreign key linking the message to a customer record.
fields.msg_direction: Indicates whether the message was incoming or outgoing.
fields.msg_created_at: Timestamp when the message was created.
fields.msg_update_at: Timestamp when the message was last updated.

integrated.description: Stores details about external integrations connected to assistants or systems (e.g., Slack, Gmail, or APIs).

fields.integrated_id: Unique identifier for each integration record.
fields.assistant_id_fk: Foreign key linking the integration to a specific assistant.
fields.intergration_description: Short description of the integration purpose or usage.
fields.intergration_page_id_or_number: Associated page ID, number, or identifier for the integration.
fields.intergration_webhook_url: Webhook URL used to communicate with the integration platform.
fields.intergration_status: Indicates whether the integration is active, inactive, or pending.
fields.intergration_created_at: Timestamp indicating when the integration record was created.

reviews.description: Stores customer reviews and ratings related to conversations or tickets. Each record represents a user's feedback, including their rating, comments, and the time when the review was created.

fields.review_id: Unique identifier for each review record
fields.conversation_thread_id_fk: Foreign key linking the review to conversation thread table.
fields.comment_posted: Text of the review or feedback provided by the user.
fields.review_created_at: Timestamp indicating when the review was created.
